examples: Astragalus Membranaceus - Contains 21 kinds of oxyacid for supply the hair with nutrients.
This paper will deal with the law of the progressive changes of the inorganic oxyacid in its oxidization degree and will analyse the factors affecting them.
The difference of ammonia, amido, amino group and quaternary ammonium salt, some common wrong expressions on them, and the valence state of phosphorus in some of its oxyacid were pointed out.
